summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Defined Duration 10 ETF (DDX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively-managed fund-of-funds that seeks capital appreciation and reduced investment volatility by using an algo to dynamically reallocate equity and fixed income ETFs depending on market risk. DDX was launched on Sep 21, 2021 and is issued by Discipline Funds.
